name: RNERadialChart
description: Concentric ring chart: multiple rings with partial fill (0–100% per ring), blue gradient, center hole, optional center text

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data: one item per concentric ring. value = fill percentage (0–100), label optional (tooltip). Example: [{ value: 90, label: 'Score' }, { value: 80 }, { value: 50 }]

innerRadius.name: innerRadius
innerRadius.description: Inner radius of the chart (center hole), e.g. '20%' or 40. Default: '20%'

backgroundColor.name: backgroundColor
backgroundColor.description: Color for the unfilled portion of each ring. Default: '#e8e8e899'

centerText.name: centerText
centerText.description: Optional center text (e.g. main value or title).

centerSubtext.name: centerSubtext
centerSubtext.description: Optional center subtext shown below center text (e.g. label or unit).

startAngle.name: startAngle
startAngle.description: Start angle of the fill (and animation), in degrees. 0 = right (3 o'clock), 90 = top (12 o'clock). Default: 0

clockwise.name: clockwise
clockwise.description: Direction of the fill and animation. true = clockwise, false = counter-clockwise. Default: false

ringGap.name: ringGap
ringGap.description: Gap between concentric rings, as percentage of chart radius (e.g. '4%') or number. Default: '4%'

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to show the legend (ring labels). Default: true

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Built-in React Native ring tooltip overlay when renderTooltip is omitted: card (default), compact, kpi, striped, or none to hide the overlay.

renderTooltip.name: renderTooltip
renderTooltip.description: Optional (params) => ReactNode for the RN tooltip body at the pointer. When set, replaces the layout chosen by tooltip. Params: ringLabel, value (fill 0–100), color, pointerX and pointerY.

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels.

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels.

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart segments. Overrides theme colors.

onSelect.name: onSelect
onSelect.description: Callback when the user selects (taps/clicks) a data point on a series (when supported).
